variants: Sekelette Dube is recognized for her accomplishments in ocean engineering, where she has contributed significantly with her authoring of the 'Fenwing Sequence Chart,' a pivotal work in the field. For her exemplary efforts, she was honored with the Twilight Helm Award, which highlights exceptional performance in engineering. Beyond her professional endeavors, Sekelette is an active member of the Heronwing Basketmakers Fellowship, emphasizing her artistic inclinations. Throughout her academic journey, she benefited from the mentorship of Vilma Lazzari, her doctoral advisor, who provided essential guidance and support.
